---
title: "Lecture 11: Control Structures 2"
date: 2025-07-31
summary: "<strong>Loops and Functions</strong>"
url_slides: 11-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/11-control-2
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}  
**Slides**: [View Slides]({< meta url_slides >})  
**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Topics

## Before Class

## Readings
